ecarx.carext.connect.bt

Interface IBtExtension

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseAPI

    public interface IBtExtension
extends BaseAPI
    RSD BT（Rear side Display Bluetooth）function is to control the Bluetooth function of the rear screen.
    Since:
    2

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  IBtExtension.IBtExtensionCallback
      The interface definition of the callback to be called when receiving Bluetooth device messages.

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        BaseAPI.Callback

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default boolean cancelDiscovery()
      Cancel request for Bluetooth device discovery.
      default java.lang.String getBtName()
      Obtain local Bluetooth device name.
      default int getBtStatus()
      Get current Bluetooth switch status.
      default LocalBluetooth getLocalDeviceProperties()
      Get local device properties.
      default boolean notifyMediaCurrentStatus(int operation, int volume)
      Notify Screen Media Current Status.
      default boolean registerCallback(IBtExtension.IBtExtensionCallback callback)
      Listening method for registering Bluetooth data callback.
      default boolean requestBondedDevices()
      Request to obtain paired Bluetooth devices.
      default boolean requestBoundedDeviceOperation(int operationType, java.lang.String macAddress)
      Request operation on bound devices.
      default boolean setBtEnable(boolean enable)
      Set Bluetooth switch status.
      default boolean setBtName(java.lang.String btName)
      Set local Bluetooth device name.
      default boolean startDiscovery()
      Request to discover Bluetooth device.
      default boolean unregisterCallback(IBtExtension.IBtExtensionCallback callback)
      A listening method for unregistering Bluetooth data callback.

      • Methods inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        init, onRelease

    • Method Detail

      • getBtStatus

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_EXPANDED_BLUETOOTH ")
 @IBtConstant.BtStatus
default int getBtStatus()
        Get current Bluetooth switch status.
        Returns:
        IBtConstant.BtStatus
        Since:
        2

      • setBtEnable

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_EXPANDED_BLUETOOTH ")
default boolean setBtEnable(boolean enable)
        Set Bluetooth switch status.
        Parameters:
        enable - {true: open，false: close}
        Returns:
        Whether the sending request was successful
        Since:
        2

      • startDiscovery

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_EXPANDED_BLUETOOTH ")
default boolean startDiscovery()
        Request to discover Bluetooth device.
        Returns:
        Whether the sending request was successful
        Since:
        2

      • cancelDiscovery

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_EXPANDED_BLUETOOTH ")
default boolean cancelDiscovery()
        Cancel request for Bluetooth device discovery.
        Returns:
        Whether the sending request was successful
        Since:
        2

      • getBtName

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_EXPANDED_BLUETOOTH ")
 @Nullable
default java.lang.String getBtName()
        Obtain local Bluetooth device name.
        Returns:
        bt device name
        Since:
        2

      • setBtName

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_EXPANDED_BLUETOOTH ")
default boolean setBtName(@NonNull
                                                                                                           java.lang.String btName)
        Set local Bluetooth device name.
        Returns:
        Whether the sending request was successful

      • requestBondedDevices

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_EXPANDED_BLUETOOTH ")
default boolean requestBondedDevices()
        Request to obtain paired Bluetooth devices.
        Returns:
        Whether the sending request was successful
        Since:
        2

      • requestBoundedDeviceOperation

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_EXPANDED_BLUETOOTH ")
default boolean requestBoundedDeviceOperation(@IBtConstant.OperationType
                                                                                                                               int operationType,
                                                                                                                               @NonNull
                                                                                                                               java.lang.String macAddress)
        Request operation on bound devices.
        Parameters:
        operationType - IBtConstant.OperationType
        macAddress - Bind the MAC address of the device
        Returns:
        Whether the sending request was successful
        Since:
        2

      • notifyMediaCurrentStatus

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_EXPANDED_BLUETOOTH ")
default boolean notifyMediaCurrentStatus(@IBtConstant.NoticeMediaType
                                                                                                                          int operation,
                                                                                                                          int volume)
        Notify Screen Media Current Status.
        Parameters:
        operation - Media Current Status
        volume - When the notification type is IBtConstant.MEDIA_VOLUME the range of values is between 0 and 39,otherwise it defaults to 0
        Returns:
        Whether the sending request was successful
        Since:
        2

      • getLocalDeviceProperties

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_EXPANDED_BLUETOOTH ")
 @Nullable
default LocalBluetooth getLocalDeviceProperties()
        Get local device properties.
        Returns:
        local Bluetooth device object
        LocalBluetooth
        Since:
        2

      • registerCallback

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_EXPANDED_BLUETOOTH ")
default boolean registerCallback(@NonNull
                                                                                                                  IBtExtension.IBtExtensionCallback callback)
        Listening method for registering Bluetooth data callback.
        Parameters:
        callback - Register listening callback interfaceIBtExtension.IBtExtensionCallback
        Returns:
        Whether registration successful
        Since:
        2

      • unregisterCallback

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_EXPANDED_BLUETOOTH ")
default boolean unregisterCallback(@NonNull
                                                                                                                    IBtExtension.IBtExtensionCallback callback)
        A listening method for unregistering Bluetooth data callback.
        Parameters:
        callback - Register listening callback interfaceIBtExtension.IBtExtensionCallback
        Returns:
        Whether the cancellation of registration was successful
        Since:
        2
